title: The Directional Weave

features.name: loom-frame-ascending
features.desc-on-touch: the frame rises toward a direction that has never been mapped. the threads are learning to move sideways through unmeasured space.

features.name: adinkra-language-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: symbols for freedom, recurrence, and things that refuse to end. some were invented yesterday. some are being invented by the weave itself.

features.name: thread-direction-cloud
features.desc-on-touch: the weft moves in a direction you have no words for. the loom is weaving toward places geometry forgot to name.

features.name: kente-memory-stack
features.desc-on-touch: panels of cloth stacked showing progression: the weave is teaching itself by storing what it has already become.

features.name: unfinished-selvage-arch
features.desc-on-touch: loose threads at the edge point toward a completion that refuses to arrive. the weave continues past every ending.

inscription: the weave continues toward a direction that has never been a place before

file.name: KenteWeaving_Adinkra_PhotoRecord_And_NewSymbols_1992-Present.txt
file.note: textile fragments showing freedom symbols plus invented marks for recurrence and things that refuse to end. cloth that documents its own unfinishing.

exits.label: back to the knotting where the loom still learns how to keep moving
where the weave learned to name its own directions
toward the international weaver's archive where cloths speak each other's grammars
toward the spiral where the weave learns it will never finish
